methodology: Income-to-market ratios use FFIEC-style AMI bands and tract income categories from public reference baselines, joined to HMDA lender production and declination aggregates. County opportunity scores combine share, income fit, and demand proxies. Replace reference file with live FFIEC AMI + tract ingest for production-grade tract-level accuracy.

signalCards.title: Middle-income tracts under index vs market
signalCards.body: Origination mix in middle-income tracts (40.7%) trails peer share hints in lower AMI bands — review county focus in top opportunity markets.

signalCards.title: Denial rate elevated below 90% of area median income
signalCards.body: Denial rate in the lowest AMI band is 17.5%, led by Debt-to-income ratio and Credit history.

signalCards.title: Whitespace: TX (statewide proxy), TX

communityReachDashboard.narrative: Origination mix skews toward borrowers at or below moderate AMI relative to market.
